sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n580" key="a)gkuli/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγκυλ-ίζομαι</orth>, in wrestling, <sense id="n580.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clasp the adversary's neck,</tr_> dub. l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:176" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.176</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
